chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S- 560 of 2024. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1.For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2.For hearing of main case. 3.For hearing of M.A NO.4711/2024. 21.11.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Riaz Hussain Solangi, advocate for the respondent No.5. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Addl. P.G. ========== Advocate for the applicant has filed statement along with certain documents, taken on record. Heard learned counsel for the applicant, respondent as well as Addl. P.G and perused the material available on record including order dated 26.9.2024. From the perusal of impugned order it reveals that it was passed after considering all the necessary facts and while passing order no illegality has been committed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace nor any illegality has been pointed out by learned counsel, therefore, same is maintained. In the circumstances, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed. J U D G E Shabir/P.S
